resume.raw_text:
=== Emiliano Hernandez Cordero - Resume.pdf ===
EMILIANO HERNANDEZ CORDERO
Staten Island, NY | (347) 544-3827 | emilianocordero122007@aol.com

EDUCATION
John Jay College of Criminal Justice – CUNY, New York, NY
Bachelor of Arts in Criminal Justice | Expected Graduation: 2029

EXPERIENCE
McDonald’s – 600 W 125th St, New York, NY 10027
Crew Member | Sept 20, 2025 – Dec 22, 2025
(cid:127) Provided fast-paced customer service in a high-volume environment.
(cid:127) Operated point-of-sale systems and handled cash transactions accurately.
(cid:127) Prepared food according to safety, quality, and cleanliness standards.
(cid:127) Collaborated with team members to maintain efficiency during peak hours.

We Can’t Breathe – Harlem & Brooklyn, NY | Founder’s Assistant | May 2024 – Aug 2024
(cid:127) Researched organizations for donations and scholarships for low-income students.
(cid:127) Created persuasive emails to engage sponsors and coordinated food distribution efforts.

La Colmena Staten Island Community Job Center – Staten Island, NY | Founder’s Assistant | Jan 2025
– Apr 2025
(cid:127) Provided Spanish-English interpretation and supported event planning.
(cid:127) Organized documents and managed resource distribution at community events.

EVC New Media Arts – New York, NY | Teacher’s Helper | May 2023 – Aug 2023
(cid:127) Assisted with classroom activities, small group instruction, and student support.

Rosie O’Grady’s – New York, NY | Busboy | Jan 2021 – Sept 2021
(cid:127) Maintained cleanliness, supported waitstaff, and prepared dining areas for service.

EXTRACURRICULARS
Dream Team: Co-Leader, New York, NY
Alianza Multicultural Group: Member, New York, NY
Speak Hire Communication Program: Participant, New York, NY

SKILLS & LANGUAGES
Microsoft Office, Google Suite, Canva
Bilingual: English & Spanish
Communication, teamwork, leadership
